title: Low Fire
description: Make the frst-person fire overlay less obtrusive by lowering its height on screen.
body:
# Low Fire

Low fire is a simple client-side mod that reduces the coverage of the fire in first-person view. Low fire works with any resource pack, and is compatible with all mods.
 
You can change the fire height by pressing the "next fire offset" keybind (unbound by default) or by editing the config file.
